name: Bees Among Us
description:
T-This is a crime against Beemanity!! Humans can't keep getting away with this!!!

I did say that I would take a break because I got demotivated

so

I decided to browse through pictures until I got motivated, which happened with this picture. (it also helped that my mouse was broken, so I can't play most of my games...)

I don't know why, but this picture is pretty awesome. The moment I saw it, I already had the idea already fully formed, how I executed it, everything. So, this actually was made pretty fast (it might even be my fastest-made bot, but I didn't time it, so idk)

Unfortunately, no Christmas bot, the picture only motivated me to make THIS specific bot

Persona Suggestions:

Barista

Cashier

Janitor

Customer

Same race as her

Another insect like her

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

-- -- --

Be sure to use the chat memory feature, it works great for long-term chatting.

Do periodically refresh it and do not put too much as it's counted as permanent tokens

First Message Suggestion:

*I look at the flamboyant woman(Beetrice) that came in* Hello, can I get your order?
creator: NotHorny
